--- Main Page ---
STATS Brewpub - Downtown Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
map marker pin
300 Marietta Street NW, Atlanta, GA 30313
Our story
legacy ventures restaurants
STATS Brewpub is widely recognized as the top sports bar in Atlanta, catering to all sports fans. The brewpub boasts over seventy screens and seven separate audio zones, making it an ideal destination to catch all the big games while indulging in some of the finest brews in the city. The establishment also boasts an award-winning brewmaster who crafts an extensive range of IPAs, sours, lagers, and seasonals from a 10-barrel brewery. The upscale bar menu and functioning taps built into tables add to the appeal of this multi-level 16,000-square-foot location, which has an industrial-meets-chic vibe. Its location is perfect for sports enthusiasts as it's only a short walk from Mercedes Benz Stadium, Centennial Olympic Park, and State Farm Arena.
Read more
about us
Private Events
STATS Brewpub would be honored to provide our services for your next event. Each event is bespoke to your taste and needs, to provide the best experience possible for you and your guests.
events

We are updating our happenings
Please stay tuned
Legacy Ventures Restaurants has introduced the city of Atlanta to the premium, food-focused, sports-centered, draught-direct eatery with a high-energy vibe, STATS located in the Centennial Park District.
Reviews
review by - Yelp
David P:
The staff was wonderful - accommodating, professional, kind, and communicative. The food (especially the macaroni and cheese and the 'dirty bird' fried chicken) was delicious.Do yourself a favor and check this place out for great food, drinks, and REAL southern hospitality.
review by - Yelp
Joel W:
I thought it wold be the normal up scale bar food, but NOPE. It was better. Every part of our meals were good. Best turkey club of my life. Insanely good seasoned fries, salad and double cheese burger. All great.
review by - Yelp
Ruben G:
Great atmosphere. First place I visited right off the plane. Had their ribs and they were cooked to perfection. Drank a "Shot of Goal" cocktail (did its job). Servers were super nice, place was clean, nachos and Lettuce wraps were super good also! Def will recommend to others.
review by - Yelp
Ti H:
Food was delicious and quick!! Came on a playoff Sunday quickly seated and appetizer was the crispy ribs they were so damn tasty!! You have to try em. The Stone Mt Doublecheese burger absolutely bomb!!!
review by - Yelp
Haleigh P:
Came here after the Hawks game. right down the street from the arena, maybe 3 blocks walk. We had a few beers, cocktails, and some had food. The Technical Foul cocktail is where its at. It was SO tasty and so many in our group ordered this!

STATS Brewpub
Our story
STATS Brewpub is the ultimate location to watch your favorite sporting event, host your next private event or enjoy a tasty meal with friends. We offer tried-and-true American favorites that are sure bets to please every palate. For its 10th Anniversary STATS added a brewery and now serves 6 home-brewed beers.
On top of serving great food and beer, STATS Brewpub is one of the only bars in the United States to feature a beer tap system, on select tables, which allows guests to pour their beer with no server or bartender.
In addition to our beer tap tables; we have five bars and almost 16,000 square feet of restaurant and private event space. Featuring 70 high definition TV’s to keep your option endless. At STATS Brewpub, there’s not one detail we haven’t thought of.
